tasks.label: reset chip
args: /workspace/tools/openocd-hpm/install/bin/openocd -s /workspace/hpm_sdk/boards/openocd -f probes/cmsis_dap.cfg -f soc/hpm5300.cfg -f ${workspaceFolder}/Board/HPM5361_SuperCap_board/HPM5361_SuperCap_board.cfg -c 'adapter speed 1000' -c 'bindto 127.0.0.1' -c 'init; reset run; shutdown'
